title: Scope And M25 DW Result
summary: Updated the manuscript scope to simultaneous SVAR only, added an early Monte Carlo triage gate after the analytical J-test inversion, and completed the M25 standard-DW J-test derivation.

user_inputs.text: User notes: focus only on the simultaneous SVAR, not VAR lags, to keep the paper simple; after analytical results for the J-test inversion, run a Monte Carlo overview to see how well it works before spending too much time; update tasks and plan and continue with the next goal task.

agent_actions.description: Recorded the user scope and evidence-sequencing notes in manuscript logs and planning surfaces.
Updated the paper plan, paper map, dashboard, task board, workplan, source packet, replication plan, draft notes, and formal registry.
Created manuscript/derivations/standard-dw-j-test-under-noise.md with the M25 working derivation for standard-DW J-test inversion under residual noise.

checks.description: python scripts/check_manuscript.py: passed with expected open-milestone warning before closure
